notes: Convert FAQ slot to accordion on services

content.value:
Services FAQ

What services are included?

We provide website execution, local SEO, Google profile optimisation, booking or ordering flows, and ongoing support.

Can I start with one service first?

Yes. Most businesses start with the highest-impact bottleneck, then expand in phases.

Do you support both product and service businesses?

Yes. We run separate paths for ecommerce-led and booking-led businesses.
